英國英格蘭斯塔福爾李
zh.Nether Stowey, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特瑟 斯度維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Stafford於1375年7月5日出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Humphrey Stafford28歲，母親Alice Greville30歲。她於1398年與Sir John Touchet Lord Audley在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年5月3日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾李享年29歲。

英国英格兰斯塔福爾李
zh-hans.Nether Stowey, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特瑟 斯度維
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Stafford于1375年7月5日出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Humphrey Stafford28岁，母亲Alice Greville30岁。她于1398年与Sir John Touchet Lord Audley在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年5月3日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾李享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Stafford was born on 5 July 1375, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Humphrey Stafford, was 28 and her mother, Alice Greville, was 30. She married Sir John Touchet Lord Audley in 1398, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 3 May 1405, in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Stafford est née le 5 juillet 1375, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Stafford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Greville, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Touchet Lord Audley en 1398, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1405, à Leigh, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Stafford am 5. Juli 1375 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey Stafford 28 und ihre Mutter Alice Greville 30. Sie hat 1398 in Staffordshire, England Sir John Touchet Lord Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1405 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Stafford è nata il il 5 luglio 1375 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Humphrey Stafford, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Alice Greville, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Touchet Lord Audley nel 1398, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 maggio 1405, nel Leigh, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Staffordが1375年7月5日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Humphrey Staffordは28歳，母Alice Grevilleは30歳であった。1398年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでSir John Touchet Lord Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年5月3日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアレイグで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Stafford(이)가 1375년 7월 5일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Stafford(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Greville(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1398년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Sir John Touchet Lord Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Touchet Lord Audley em 1398, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1405, em Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Stafford родилась 5 июля 1375 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Stafford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Greville, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Touchet Lord Audley в 1398 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 мая 1405 г. в местности лиг, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

Se casó con Sir John Touchet Lord Audley en 1398, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1405, en Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
